# Category: cloud_network_security

targetProject: ${PROJECT}

- type: compute.v1.network
  name: $NETWORKNAME
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.243.0/28
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
